'''Kinnin Vo-Shay''' was a slightly [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Gambler/Legends|gambler]]. He was considered a handsome man, with stony features and a jagged scar starting at his lip and running past his nose. His hair had turned white by the time he reached his fifties. Vo-Shay's trademark was an [[Obsidian/Legends|obsidian]] pendant, which many people believed was a mystical artifact and the source of his good luck.

==Biography==

Circa [[50 BBY/Legends|50 BBY]], Vo-Shay piloted his freighter, the ''[[Ashanda Ray]]'' into a dangerous region of space called the [[Tyus Cluster/Legends|Tyus Cluster]]. There, he was trapped in the island of stability, at the center of a cluster of [[Black hole/Legends|black holes]]. He would have died there, had he not met the [[Force ghost/Legends|ghost]] of a previous victim, a [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] named [[Aryzah]]. She taught him a little about the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]], and somehow helped Vo-Shay escape the cluster. Aryzah's ghost came along with him when he escaped.<ref name="TLH" />

Though some fifty years had passed to the outside [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], the gravitational fields of the Tyus Cluster had distorted the flow of time in Vo-Shay's frame of reference. As Vo-Shay put it, "[[Time travel/Legends|time was nonexistent]]" at the cluster's center: he did not age a day.<ref name="TLH" />

Vo-Shay promptly returned to the gambling tables, skinning a [[Herglic/Legends|Herglic]] named [[Doune]] out of a quarter of a million [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. The single credit he had bet at the beginning of the [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] game had been provided by a farmboy named [[Nyo]], who hoped to use his share of the cash to buy a [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]]. Nyo got his lightsaber, and Vo-Shay decided to sign him on as the first mate of the ''Ashanda Ray'', where Aryzah decided to teach Nyo the ways of the Force.<ref name="TLH" />
